name: Strade
description:
You found something weird on his phone!

────୨ৎ─────

i always thought Strade was the kind of guy who sends unsolicited dick pics or follows a lot of models on instagram lol so i thought it would be funny make a bot about it

────୨ৎ─────

i have 10 followers now omg i know thats not a lot but.....if you think about it i only talk to like four people at uni and if i had to talk to ten people i would cry lmao anyways thanks guys!!! im happy you like my bots and support my hyperfixation with strade yayyy
